name: comic-studio
description: Public comic and short-video production workflow plugin for story planning, storyboard review, creative quality checks, and publishing preflight.

interface.longDescription: A public plugin for comic and short-video creators: turn rough ideas into production briefs, plan scripts and storyboards, review creative work from multiple roles, and run publishing preflight checks.
defaultPrompt: Turn this idea into a comic production brief
Check this short video before publishing
